title: Guillque's Enhanced NameTags
description: Vanillae-friendly custom texture for easter egg's nametags
body:
# Guillque's Enhanced Nametags add custom textures for special Easter egg nametags in Minecraft Vanilla.

Custom texture :

**jeb_ :** Animated rainbow texture
**Johnny :** Illager-style texture
**Toast :** Rabbit-themed texture
**Dinnerbone & Grumm :** Upside-down nametag

**_No mods required_**
